title: Serene Home Meditation Corner with Cushion and Candles
description: A calm and peaceful home meditation space featuring a round meditation cushion on a woven rug, two softly glowing candles, a small green indoor plant on a wooden stool, and a minimalist wooden shelf with natural decor. The space is illuminated by gentle natural light coming through a nearby window with light curtains, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere perfect for mindfulness and relaxation.
